sn35.32:1.1:
1
"Sabbamaññitasamugghātasappāyaṁ vo, bhikkhave, paṭipadāṁ desessāmi. Taṁ suṇātha. Katamā ca sā, bhikkhave, sabbamaññitasamugghātasappāyā paṭipadā?
sn35.32:1.2:
2
Taṁ kiṁ maññatha, bhikkhave, cakkhu niccaṁ vā aniccaṁ vā"ti?
sn35.32:1.4:
4
"Yaṁ panāniccaṁ dukkhaṁ vā taṁ sukhaṁ vā"ti?
sn35.32:1.6:
6
"Yaṁ panāniccaṁ dukkhaṁ vipariṇāmadhammaṁ, kallaṁ nu taṁ samanupassituṁ: ‘etaṁ mama, esohamasmi, eso me attā’"ti?
sn35.32:2.1:
8
"Rūpā … pe … cakkhuviññāṇaṁ … cakkhusamphasso nicco vā anicco vā"ti?
sn35.32:3.2:
23
"Yaṁ panāniccaṁ dukkhaṁ vā taṁ sukhaṁ vā"ti?
sn35.32:3.4:
25
"Yaṁ panāniccaṁ dukkhaṁ vipariṇāmadhammaṁ, kallaṁ nu taṁ samanupassituṁ: ‘etaṁ mama, esohamasmi, eso me attā’"ti?
sn35.32:4.1:
27
"Evaṁ passaṁ, bhikkhave, sutavā ariyasāvako cakkhusmimpi nibbindati, rūpesupi nibbindati, cakkhuviññāṇepi nibbindati, cakkhusamphassepi nibbindati. Yampidaṁ cakkhusamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tasmimpi nibbindati … pe … jivhāyapi nibbindati, rasesupi … pe … yampidaṁ jivhāsamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tasmimpi nibbindati … pe … . Manasmimpi nibbindati, dhammesupi nibbindati, manoviññāṇepi nibbindati, manosamphassepi nibbindati. Yampidaṁ manosamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tasmimpi nibbindati. Nibbindaṁ virajjati; virāgā vimuccati; vimuttasmiṁ vimuttamiti ñāṇaṁ hoti. ‘Khīṇā jāti, vusitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ, kataṁ karaṇīyaṁ, nāparaṁ itthattāyā’ti pajānāti.
sn35.32:5.1: Ayaṁ kho sā, bhikkhave, sabbamaññitasamugghātasappāyā paṭipadā"ti.
